title: Marqeta Completes TransactPay Acquisition, Strengthening European Payment Capabilities
text: Marqeta TransactPay Acquisition: Key Details. Overview: Marqeta has completed its acquisition of TransactPay, an E-Money Institution and BIN Sponsor that operates in the UK and European Economic Area. The deal was initially announced in February 2025. Strategic Benefits. European Market Expansion: The acquisition enables Marqeta to offer enhanced card program management across Europe, helping customers enter new markets more efficiently. Regulatory Navigation: With the TransactPay acquisition, we're better equipped to navigate the complex regulatory environment in Europe with compliance in mind, according to company leadership. Unified Program Management: Rather than juggling multiple partners, customers now gain access to consolidated card program capabilities in the region, complete with dedicated support teams. Business Impact: Marcin Glogowski, SVP Managing Director for Europe and UK CEO, highlighted momentum: processing volumes in Europe have more than doubled year-over-year, and this acquisition reinforces Marqeta's commitment to both markets as part of its global strategy. TransactPay's CEO noted the partnership will help customers accelerate growth and bring new digital payments offerings to market more efficiently.
